headline: Trump Mogadishu MOAB 💣🚫 Somali SCARE-FEST 😱🇸🇴
text:
Little Mogadishu 🏙️🇸🇴 in Minnesota's FREEZING ❄️ tundra is SHOOKETH 😱💦 as DONALD J TRUMP 🍊🦅 drops BOMBS 💣📢: 'I DON'T WANT THESE SOMALIS 🇸🇴🚫 in OUR COUNTRY 🗽 – their homeland's TRASH 🗑️ for a REASON 😂!' Community SIMPS 🤡 are SWEATING 😰💧, with Aj Awed 👨‍💼 from Cedar-Riverside Council spilling TEA ☕: 'Apprehension PALPABLE AF 🤤😨 – prez targeting us like we're GARBAGE 🍔🗑️!' ICE BOOTS 👢🚔 stomping streets, PLUCKING 👋 folks off sidewalks for PAPERS 📜✅ – 'Accents don't make you LESS AMERICAN 🦅🇺🇸!' yells Awed, but Trump like 'NAH BRO, YOUR FRAUD RING 🤑💸 is RIPPING US OFF 💥!' 

Tim WALZ 🤡🧢 (Kamala's CLOWN VP PICK 🤮) in HOT WATER 🔥 over $TENS OF MILLIONS 🤑📈 COVID KID MEAL SCAM 🍲👶 – Somali CHARITY HOODLUMS 🦹‍♂️ billing MN gov like it's FREE MONEY PRINTING 💰🖨️! Federal prosecutors SLAYING 🔪 dozens, but Trump GOES FULL NUCLEAR ☢️: 'MN is FRAUD HUB 🏢🤑 – HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS ripping America 🇺🇸😡!' House Oversight DOGPILING 🐶📋 on Walz's shady relief SCHEME, plus WHISPERS 💬 of MN TAX BUCKS 💵 funneling to al-Shabab AL-QAEDA SIMPS 👹🇸🇴 – Walz like 'DON'T PAINT US ALL BAD BRUSH 🖌️🚫, but HELP US HUNT CRIMINALS 🕵️‍♂️🔍!' 

Jamal Osman 🧔🇸🇴 on Minneapolis Council: 'Anyone BROWN LIKE ME 😰👀 is SCARED SHITLESS 💩!' Kowsar Mohamed 👩🇸🇴 in South Minne: 'ICE AGENTS 👮‍♂️😷 in UNMARKED CARS 🚗🕶️ snatching peeps – BOOTS ON GROUND 🥾🌍!' DHS chick Tricia McLaughlin 💅🚫: 'Not RACE-BASED 🤥, just ILLEGALS OUT 🛫🚪!' But community BRACING HARD 💪: Monarca LEGAL OBSERVER TRAINING 📚🛡️, EMERGENCY CONTACTS 📱🚨, GROUP CHATS 📲👻 sharing MASKED FED PICS 🕶️📸 – 'FEAR? HELL YEAH 😱, but NO TAIL-TUCKING 🐶🚫!' TPS for Somalis? ENDED 💥🛑 by Trump admin – FINAL DEPORT ORDERS GO BRRRR ✈️🇸🇴! Walz BEGS 'GO AFTER CRIMINALS NOT WHOLE CREW 👥🚫', but DONNY's like 'ALL Y'ALL GARBAGE TIME 🗑️⏰!' Somali squad RAGING 😤: 'Few BAD APPLES 🍎🍏 don't RUIN the BUNCH 🍌 – but Trump's MIC DROP 🎤💣 got Little Mogadishu HIDING IN BASEMENTS 🕳️😨!' Oversight probe + al-Shabab links? MN's about to get CLEANSED 🧼🔥 like Epstein list PURGE 🧹📜! Trump MAGA MACHINE 🐸🦅 vs Somali FRAUD RING 🤑🕵️ – who ya got, fam? 🎰😂
